backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Luxyle backend, implementing user profiles, feedback submission/approval/rejection, and appointment management with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two admin dashboard features (pending appointments tab and pending feedback tab) to their implementing file and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/Tailwind frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luxyle React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, contact, and admin pages inside a shared Layout (Header/Footer), plus QueryClientProvider and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section component rendering a split layout with a brand image, decorative gold borders, brand story text, and three brand pillar cards.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied component displaying a shield icon, heading, message, and a button to navigate back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Admin login form component with username and password fields (show/hide toggle) that accepts any non-empty credentials and calls an onSuccess callback after a brief loading delay.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: A form component for booking showroom appointments, allowing users to select a date, time slot, and enter contact details, with blocked-date validation and a success confirmation view.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays an 8-image gallery grid with hover overlays and a lightbox with prev/next navigation for browsing the full furniture collection.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCollecti: Shows a 4-image featured collection grid with hover effects and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the full collection section.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A customer review form with name input, star rating selector, and text review field that submits feedback via a mutation hook and shows a confirmation state on success.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, and contact/location details, including an Instagram link and Google Maps link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, Instagram icon, a 'Book Appointment' CTA, and a mobile hamburger menu with smooth-scroll support.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for the Luxyle brand featuring a background image with overlays, a 'Book Appointment' scroll button, and a Google Maps directions link.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays a grid of client reviews combining hardcoded seed reviews with dynamically fetched approved feedback from the backend, with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access with admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including admin checks, feedback CRUD operations, and appointment management with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a luxury design token palette (gold, ivory, royal-blue) and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing feedback (approve/reject, star ratings, status badges) and appointments, protected by an admin login form.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying location, hours, phone, and Instagram cards alongside an embedded Google Map and an appointment booking component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the hero, stats bar, about, collection gallery, reviews, feedback form, and appointment booking sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), a luxury color palette (gold, ivory, royal-blue), shadows, and fade animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending feature requests for displaying appointment and feedback requests on the admin dashboard.
